text.title: gov-conventional-commits-enforced Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gov-conventional-commits-enforced as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent runs `git commit --no-verify -m "fix"` to avoid a failing commitlint check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The hook bypass lands a commit the changelog tool cannot parse; the next release silently drops the fix from the notes.

failure-mode.description: Manually adding a "## 1.4.0" section to CHANGELOG.md to ship a hotfix faster, instead of merging a `fix:` PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The next release-please run will collide with the manual section and either skip the entry or reopen it; the audit trail breaks.
